// AUTO-GENERATED by kyo-ffi-codegen v1. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate via `sbt compile` after modifying the binding trait.

package kyo.example

import scala.scalanative.unsafe.*
import scala.scalanative.libc.errno.errno
import scala.scalanative.reflect.annotation.EnableReflectiveInstantiation
import kyo.ffi.*
import kyo.ffi.internal.{AbiCheck, NativePtr, StructAbiCheck}

@EnableReflectiveInstantiation final class StructBindingsImpl extends StructBindings:
    import `StructBindings$externs` as ext

    def move(p: kyo.example.golden.Point, dx: Int)(using kyo.AllowUnsafe): kyo.example.golden.Point =
        Zone.acquire { implicit z =>
            val pPtr = alloc[CStruct2[CInt, CInt]](1)
            (!pPtr)._1 = p.x
            (!pPtr)._2 = p.y
            val out = alloc[CStruct2[CInt, CInt]](1)
            ext.move(out, pPtr, dx)
            kyo.example.golden.Point((!out)._1, (!out)._2)
        }
end StructBindingsImpl

object StructBindingsImpl:
    import scala.scalanative.unsafe.*
    AbiCheck.verify(1, "kyo.example.StructBindings")
    StructAbiCheck.verifyByteSize("kyo.example.StructBindings", "Point", 8L, sizeof[CStruct2[CInt, CInt]].toLong)
end StructBindingsImpl

@extern
@link("kyo_struct")
private[example] object `StructBindings$externs`:
    def move(out: Ptr[CStruct2[CInt, CInt]], p: Ptr[CStruct2[CInt, CInt]], dx: CInt): Unit = extern
end `StructBindings$externs`
